calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2022 Off Calendar

Motion To Dismiss Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-11-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY Motion To Dismiss Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Judgment to be entered in favor of Defendant. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2021 Continued To Mar-09-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Having been provided several opportunities to allege facts to support a cause of action for violation of Unruh act, Plaintiff failed to do so and failed to indicate how complaint may be amended if leave to amend is granted again.
Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2021 Continued To Jan-05-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2021 Continued To Nov-03-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Amended DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-28-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED. Demurrer to the cause of action for tenant harassment is sustained without leave to amend, barred by the statute of limitations; demurrer to the cause of action for elder abuse is sustained without leave to amend, Plaintiff fails to provide any authority for the proposition that this cause of action is available under the circumstances of this case. Demurrer to the cause of action for violation of Unruh Act is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of this cause of action; this cause of action is not presently sufficiently alleged and is uncertain due to what appears to be mistakenly included allegations. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Pending Action
Off Calendar Jul-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF MARIA LUBARSKY Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Pending Action is GRANTED. Non-opposition filed.
Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2021 Continued To Sep-01-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Amended DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-25-2021 Continued To Jul-28-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY Amended DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is continued to July 28, 2021 to be heard after the pending motion to continue action. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Amended DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-24-2021 Continued To Jun-25-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S Amended DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is continued to June 25, 2021 for Plaintiff to submit a supplemental brief limited solely to citations to cases (1) where charging or/accepting contractual rent constituted elder financial abuse and (2) where landlord was found liable for financial elder abuse of a tenant. No further argument is allowed. Brief shall be filed and served no later than June 16, 2021. Judge: Vedica Puri; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2021 Continued To Jul-07-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. On March 15, 2021 parties were ordered to provide courtesy copies of their respective filings (except for reply). Plaintiff provided a copy of the opposition with a cover letter. Defendant did not provide a courtesy copy of the demurrer. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Defendant'S General Demurrer
Off Calendar Dec-18-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant'S General Demurrer is sustained with 10-day leave to amend for Plaintiff to address in good faith issues raised by demurrer. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2020 Continued To Feb-03-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Sustaining Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Court Call:
Andrew Steinfeld, Esq., 415-816-4197, appearing for Maria Lubarsky, Plaintiff.
Anthony Phillips, Esq., 415-986-5900, appearing for John Stewart Company, Defendant

ARGUED. Mr. Phillipis stated that he contested to the tentative ruling and provided case background. Mr. Steinfeld presented his oral argument in support of his postion and questioned why plaintiff counsel should update its' contact information. The Court addressed Mr. Steinfeld's question.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARIA LUBARSKY Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Sustaining Demurrer To Complaint is GRANTED as follows: Demurrer will be placed back on calendar to be heard on December 18, 2020. Plaintiff shall file an opposition to the demurrer on the merits no later than November 17, 2020; reply shall be filed no later than November 23, 2020. Plaintiff's counsel shall update its contact information with all e-filing/e-service vendors approved by the San Francisco Superior Court. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
